landing.description: Tapuesto.ai is the leading prediction market in Peru. Join the collective intelligence to combat misinformation and earn rewards with accurate forecasts.

trending.title: Trending Markets
trending.subtitle: Discover what Peru is predicting right now.

cta.title: Ready to see the future?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Peruvians who are predicting the news instead of just reading it.

m1.title: Will Peru's GDP grow more than 3% in 2024?

m2.title: Will the Minister of Economy resign before July?

m3.title: Will Peru qualify for the 2026 World Cup?

profile.gdpGrowthQ3: Will Peru's GDP grow >2% in Q3?

leaderboard.description: Measuring the collective intelligence of Peru. Climb the ranks by making accurate predictions.

register.heroDescription: Predict outcomes, combat misinformation, and earn reputation in Peru's leading prediction market.
register.createAccountDescription: Enter your details to start predicting today.

createMarket.title: Create Bet
createMarket.downPaymentDesc: Amount needed to enter the bet.
createMarket.describeBetPlaceholder: E.g. A bottle of Blue Label, A dinner at Maido, Washing dishes for a week...
createMarket.eventPlaceholder: E.g. Who will lose the most weight for the summer?
createMarket.deadlineDesc: After this date, the option to upload evidence will be enabled.
createMarket.errorMsg: An error occurred while analyzing the topic. Please try again.

challenge.title: You've been challenged!
challenge.description: Your opponent has locked their funds. Accept the bet to match their amount and activate the smart contract.
challenge.question: Will Peru's inflation drop below 3% by December 2024?

portfolio.heroDesc: Tapuesto.ai was built to combat misinformation by leveraging collective intelligence. This page showcases the system architecture, specifically highlighting the AI-driven market creation flow.
portfolio.systemArchDesc: High-level view of how the frontend, AI, and data layers interact.
portfolio.aiIntegrationDesc: How we use Google's Gemini Flash to validate prediction markets.
portfolio.fastObjectiveDesc: Prediction markets require clear, unambiguous, binary questions (Yes/No). When users propose a topic, we ping the gemini-3-flash-preview model.
portfolio.contextualAnalysisDesc: Transforms vague ideas into strict YES/NO questions.
portfolio.googleSearchDesc: Validates if the market is currently relevant and factual based on live web search data.
portfolio.structuredOutputDesc: Returns a clean prediction and reasoning for the user to review.
portfolio.step1Desc: User types a rough idea for a market (e.g. "Will inflation drop this year?").
portfolio.step2Desc: Gemini reformats it into a clear, bettable metric backed by recent Google Search data.
portfolio.step3Desc: User configures stake, deadlines, and required proof, accepting the AI's proposal.
portfolio.step4Desc: The market is created and shareable to others to start taking bets!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Desc: At tapuesto.ai, we collect information necessary for the operation of the prediction market, including profile data (nickname, email) and transactional data related to your bets.
privacy.section2Desc: We do not directly store your credit card or bank account information. We use secure and regulated payment processors to manage transactions in Soles (PEN).
privacy.section3Desc: We do not sell your personal data. Public information about your predictions (betting history) is visible on the platform for reputation (Elo) calculation purposes.
privacy.section4Desc: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no internet transmission is 100% secure.
